 File civil suit with the proper court; and
 Levy on real property and sale of delinquent property or a usable portion thereof at public auction.

observations.recommendation: We have recommended and management agreed to follow up the approval of the ten-year Solid Waste Management Plan with the National Environment Management Bureau, which shall be reviewed and updated every year by the municipal management board to ensure the efficient management of solid waste generated within its jurisdiction.
observations.managementAction: On March 15, 2017, the Municipal Mayor went to the National Solid Waste Management Commission (NSWMC) to follow-up the ten-year Solid Waste Management Plan of the LGU but unfortunately they could not trace up the plan which the LGU had submitted and yet it was in their logbook. And besides, the LGU had not received any notice from the Solid Waste Management Council/Secretariat. The LGU had e-mailed them with the cover page of the plan. The LGU scheduled a meeting on April 20, 2017 to revisit the Solid Waste Management Plan of the LGU.
observations.reason: Management was following up the approval of the ten-year Solid Waste Management Plan of the LGU but unfortunately they could not trace up the plan which the LGU had submitted and yet it was in their logbook. And besides, the LGU had not received any notice from the Solid Waste Management Council/Secretariat.
